name: Brooke Foote
ai_summary: Brooke Foote from Ogden, UT has daycare experience and seeks FT/PT roles. She emphasizes patience, safety, and conflict resolution skills with children of all ages.

transcripts.q3: Hi, my name is Brooke. I've taken care of kids from newborns all the way up to teenagers. I have two kids of my own. I love working with kids and I am passionate about it. I've worked at daycares before I you know, I've changed diapers with them outside, do Snack Time, stuff like that. So that's a little bit about me.
transcripts.q4: I live in Ogden Utah, I would be willing to travel, probably up to 30 minutes for a shift.
transcripts.q5: Part-time would probably be better, but I could also take full time shifts sometimes and probably, you know, mid-afternoon would be the best.
transcripts.q6: If two children are having conflict or if one hits another, I would separate them and explain to one why that is not, okay? And they would just have to be separated for a while. And yeah, just explain to them why it drunk.
transcripts.q7: I'm very patient I work good with the kids. I will always make sure that they're safe and well taken care of and I would always look out for them.
